title: İngilizce Hazırlık Programı Öğrencilerinin Dikkatine
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Tarih: 11 Ekim 2021

Sevgili öğrencilerimiz,

Dear Students,

Welcome to Dogus University English Preparatory Program.

English Preparatory Program courses will be face to face for 3 days and online for 2 days.

2021-2022 academic year will start with the opening ceremony on Monday, October 18, 2021.

It is compulsory to attend the online orientation program for all students enrolled in English Preparatory Program on Tuesday, October 19, 2021 at 11:00 for Foundation Level and 12:30 for Pre-Intermediate, Intermediate and Upper Intermediate students. Orientation will be conducted on MS Teams where the groups are to be created by our University.

Students can only participate in the orientation via their student e-mail addresses.

Our face-to-face classes in the English Preparatory Program will start on Wednesday, October 20, 2021.
